chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-6109 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) For order as to non-prosecution 09.9.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is almost two years ago. It was last taken up on 10.1.2024, which is over one and a half years ago, whereby a week’s time was allowed to make compliance. Despite lapse of one and a half years compliance has still not been made. The petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently and today the petition is fixed for non-prosecution. None present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
